notes: Ground-truth exogenous events for US FRED monthly panel. Index t=0 corresponds to 1986-01-01. Event dates expressed as approximate row index and calendar date. Windows in row-index units (1 unit = 1 month).

events.label: Dot-com bust and 9/11 recession 2001
events.source: NBER recession March 2001 – November 2001; INDPRO fell 6%
events.falsification_prediction: O/R drop absent in 1994-1998 negative control

events.label: Global Financial Crisis 2007-2009
events.source: NBER recession December 2007 – June 2009; INDPRO -17% peak-to-trough

expected.I: T10YFF spread widened — I proxy may show drop (higher spread = lower integration)
expected.S: M2 surge (QE) — S may paradoxically increase
expected.C: decrease during crisis; ambiguous QE-driven recovery

events.falsification_prediction: Σ extreme spike absent in 2001-2005 control

events.label: M2 definition change May 2020
events.source: Fed reclassified savings accounts into M2; M2 jumped ~$1.5T overnight

expected.S: structural break — M2-derived S jumps discontinuously. NOT a real symbolic injection.
expected.C: spurious increase in C post-2020 if S drives it — this is a known artefact

events.falsification_prediction: C signal post-2020 is artefact if it disappears when S is de-trended for M2 break
events.artefact_warning: This event is a MEASUREMENT ARTEFACT in S. Any C increase post-2020-05 driven by S must be flagged as potentially spurious. Use for falsification only — not as evidence of symbolic threshold.

events.label: COVID-19 economic shock
events.source: NBER recession February 2020; INDPRO -16.5% in two months

expected.R: extreme decrease (TCU bottomed at 64% in April 2020)
expected.C: disruption then ambiguous recovery; confounded by M2 artefact

events.falsification_prediction: O extreme spike absent in 2015-2018 control
